subcodes.first_line: How, O my God, can a tongue that hath called upon other than Thee be worthy of Thy mention, or a heart that hath turned to aught else besides Thee be fitting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فکیف یا الهی لسان التی یدعو غیرک یلیق لذکرک و قلب الذی التفت الی دونک ینبغی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @limits of language, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
